watchpoints.automatedVerdict: Automated watchpoint nodes are very clean, but the full route is not a whole-suite sweep; treat as earned-power human-test priority, not an automated nerf.
evidence: Retinue + Training Yard II: 17 wins / 3 defeats / 1 timeout across 21 lab runs.

watchpoints.automatedVerdict: Greedy failures continue to read as timing and conversion risk: first waves are generally survived, but surplus resources do not consistently become a fast win.
evidence: Greedy Economy: 31 wins / 11 defeats / 43 timeouts across 85 lab runs.
First wave survived in 85/85 Greedy source runs.

watchpoints.automatedVerdict: Fast Army is decisive in Cinderfen but still pays failure risk across the broader suite; do not slow it just because it is fast.
evidence: Fast Army: 53 wins / 24 defeats / 8 timeouts across 85 lab runs.

watchpoints.automatedVerdict: Early nodes are structurally stable in automation.
evidence: First-wave not-survived markers: 24/72; speed routes can end before absorbing a first wave.

watchpoints.automatedVerdict: Pressure remains structurally actionable in automation, but automated telemetry cannot prove human noticeability during combat stress.
Cinderfen Crossing is structurally fair for the safe script; remaining questions are route feel and pressure noticeability.
evidence: Cinderfen Crossing record: 26 wins / 0 defeats / 13 timeouts.

watchpoints.automatedVerdict: Cinderfen Watch is structurally fair for the safe script; remaining questions are route feel and pressure noticeability.
evidence: Cinderfen Watch record: 25 wins / 0 defeats / 11 timeouts.

watchpoints.automatedVerdict: Ashen Outpost remains beatable and stable for safe play, while route timeouts keep it as a pacing and final-assault watchpoint.
evidence: Ashen Outpost record: 22 wins / 0 defeats / 14 timeouts.
